description: Fix critical issues from semantic review: FCM race condition, wrong gcm_sender_id in manifest.json, and duplicate loadScript function definition.
steps: Fix the FCM race condition by moving initFCM() inside the .then() callback of initNotifikasi()
Fix the wrong gcm_sender_id in manifest.json from '103953800507' to '48180557823'
Rename the function-scoped loadScript inside downloadPdfLaporan to _loadPdfScript to avoid shadowing the module-level loadScript
acceptance_criteria: initFCM() is called inside the .then() callback of initNotifikasi(), not separately
No duplicate loadScript function names exist in the file
python3 -m json.tool manifest.json passes without errors
verification: Grep for initFCM in the .then() callback
Grep gcm_sender_id in manifest.json should show 48180557823
findings: All three review issues fixed: (1) FCM race condition resolved by moving initFCM() inside initNotifikasi().then(), (2) gcm_sender_id corrected to 48180557823, (3) inner loadScript renamed to _loadPdfScript to eliminate shadowing.
